title: AIO - Villager! Fill my XP
description:
Let a villager help you with storing your XP.

Give him a glass bottle and he will give you an experience bottle back.

Smelt the bottles in a furnace to retreive your XP
body:
_**Villager! Fill my XP**_

Alternative way to store XP.

How to use:

1. Stand next to a villager with an empty glass bottle and right click.

- You will get an experience bottle from him.

2. Smelt the bottle in a furnace

- It smelts super fast and when you take the empty bottles out your XP will be 
  restored.

- This way you can mend your items with the XP you stored

INFO:

**_It work best when the villager is unemployed._**
